title: Computer Account Creation for Delegation Abuse (MachineAccountQuota)
description: Detects creation of a new computer account by an unprivileged user abusing the default MachineAccountQuota (10). Attacker-created machine accounts are the pivot for RBCD takeovers and Certifried (CVE-2022-26923). Tools include impacket addcomputer.py and PowerMad New-MachineAccount.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*New-MachineAccount*' or 'Command Line' like '*addcomputer.py*' or 'Command Line' like '*addcomputer*' or 'Command Line' like '*PowerMad*' or 'Command Line' like '*-computer-name*')))
